allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'try { [System.Management.Automation.PSParser]::Tokenize\(\(Get-Content '\\''C:/tools/OhMyPosh-Installer/Setup-OhMyPosh.ps1'\\'' -Raw\), [ref]$null\) | Out-Null; Write-Host '\\''SYNTAX OK'\\'' } catch { Write-Host "SYNTAX ERROR: $_" }')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'try { [System.Management.Automation.PSParser]::Tokenize\(\(Get-Content '\\''C:/tools/OhMyPosh-Installer/Set-Theme.ps1'\\'' -Raw\), [ref]$null\) | Out-Null; Write-Host '\\''SYNTAX OK'\\'' } catch { Write-Host "SYNTAX ERROR: $_" }')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Install-Module PSReadLine -Force -SkipPublisherCheck -Scope CurrentUser 2>&1; Get-Module -ListAvailable PSReadLine | Sort-Object Version -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "PSReadLine v$\($_.Version\)" }')

Bash(pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command "Install-Module PSReadLine -Force -SkipPublisherCheck -Scope CurrentUser; Get-Module -ListAvailable PSReadLine | Sort-Object Version -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 | Format-Table Name,Version")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$themesDir = $env:LOCALAPPDATA + '\\''\\Programs\\oh-my-posh\\themes'\\''; if \(Test-Path $themesDir\) { Get-ChildItem $themesDir -Filter '\\''M365*'\\'' | Select Name } else { Write-Host '\\''Not in Programs'\\''; $p = \(Get-Command oh-my-posh\).Source; $d = Split-Path $p; Write-Host "OMP dir: $d"; Get-ChildItem \(Split-Path $p\) -Recurse -Filter '\\''M365*'\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select FullName }')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'try { [System.Management.Automation.PSParser]::Tokenize\(\(Get-Content '\\''C:/tools/OhMyPosh-Installer/Setup-OhMyPosh.ps1'\\'' -Raw\), [ref]$null\) | Out-Null; Write-Host '\\''SYNTAX OK'\\'' } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" }')
